name: ai-scientist
description: Fully autonomous scientific research pipeline — generate ideas, run experiments, write papers, and peer review. All stages run natively in Claude Code with no external LLM API keys.

S2_API_KEY.description: Semantic Scholar API key for literature search (recommended). Get one at https://www.semanticscholar.org/product/api

PROJECT_DIR.description: Path to the AI-Scientist-v2 repository checkout (with ai_scientist/ and bfts_config.yaml)
